title: T-021 — GRN from PO Server Action (multi-LP per line) (WH §7.1, §7.3)
prompt:
# T-021 — GRN from PO Server Action (multi-LP per line) (WH §7.1, §7.3)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §7.1, §7.3
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement Server Action `completeGrnFromPo` performing the §7.1 3-step flow: validate per-line multi-row qty against PO ordered + tolerance, create one LP per grn_items row, write stock_moves (receipt), update PO aggregation, emit grn.completed event. Never auto-splits PO lines.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/grn-from-po.ts`: function `completeGrnFromPo({grn_id, lines: [{po_line_id, rows: [{qty, batch, expiry, pallet_id, location_id, catch_weight_kg}]}]})`.
2. Validation per §7.3: `SUM(rows.qty per po_line) ≤ po_line.pending_qty × (1+over_receipt_tolerance_pct/100)` else hard block; soft block + Manager override path; batch/expiry required per row if settings demand; catch weight required if product.is_catch_weight.
3. Atomic transaction: create one LP per row (via T-016), populate grn_items.lp_id, INSERT stock_moves(move_type='receipt', from=NULL, to=row.location_id), aggregate po_lines.received_qty += SUM, transition PO status, emit outbox `grn.completed` via T-047.

## Files
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/grn-from-po.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/grn-from-po.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given PO line with `ordered_qty=100, pending_qty=100, over_receipt_tolerance_pct=0`, when a GRN with rows summing to 100 completes, then 1 LP per row is created with the row's batch/expiry/location, and po_line.received_qty becomes 100.
2. Given two grn_items rows for the same po_line (40+60) with different batches, when complete, then 2 LPs are created, none auto-merged.
3. Given rows sum 110 with tolerance 0, when complete, then service hard-blocks with V-WH-GRN-002.
4. Given the action succeeds, when outbox is inspected, then a `grn.completed` event with `lp_ids[]` is emitted.

## Test strategy
- RED: `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/grn-from-po.test.ts` asserting multi-LP creation, no auto-split, tolerance enforcement, outbox emission.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test grn-from-po`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not auto-split or merge grn_items rows.
- Do not skip outbox event.
- Do not allow over-receipt without explicit tolerance setting + role gate.
- Do not commit partial state on validation failure (atomicity required).

## Dependencies
- T-005
- T-016
- T-025

Never auto-splits PO lines.
